subject: Inquiry about AI automation services for our logistics team
body:
Hi,

I came across your profile and I'm very interested in understanding how AI
automation could help our 12-person logistics team reduce manual data entry.

Specifically, we spend about 3 hours/day copying data from supplier emails
into our ERP system. Could you arrange a 30-minute call this week to discuss
whether your system could address this use case?

Our availability: Tuesday 2–4 PM or Thursday any time after 11 AM (PKT).

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Operations Manager, FastMove Logistics
